text: Good game overall, but full of ♥♥♥♥ bugs didn't finish the game because of it and prolly never will, and i read on net that devs know about the bugs but didn't want to fix them so i guess ♥♥♥♥ devs what to do

Great game. Terrible for your life.

1,000 hours in and I still haven't peaked. The game is polished, competitive, and dangerously addictive. One round always becomes ten.

Only install if you're unemployed or have genuinely given up on having a life. You've been warned.

Your Mom's one and only Ex,
Supreme_SARMAJI
Yeah. After 900 hours of driving, I must say it is good. Combined with mods, it is perfect.
